/X:DA'S MOTION TO DETAIN FILED/X:MOTION IS DENIED/X:ORDER SEALING EXHIBITS IN SUPPORT OF NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO DETAIN WITHOUT BAIL SIGNED AND FILED/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DEN OF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/X:THE DEFENSE RESERVES THE RIGHT TO DEMURRER,/NTW/LDPX:04-18-22 (10TH)/X: COURTESTABLISHES 60TH DAY AS 06-03-22/BAIL:10000/X:BAIL IS SET WITHOUT PREJUDICE/X:AS A CONDITION OF BAIL, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONICMONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA1:JOJO VARGAS BALINGIT/SAORD2/SAORD3/CONTD ACM ELIG RPT, DOP30 CMHD ELIG RPT FROM JPS/TEXT:CRT ORDS DEFT EXAM PURS PC 1001,36 FOR REFERRAL TO MHD/JAIL PSY/MHD/REP:04-15-22/M09/X:MATTER IS REFERRED TO PRE-TRIAL DIVERSION FOR AN IN-CUSTODY ASSESSMENT,/CONTD PRELIM HRG, DOP/CONTD:FOR PRELIMINARY HEARING;ACM POST-ARRAIGNMENT ELIGIBILITY REPORT; RECEIPT OF REPORT FROM JPS FOR MENTAL HEALTH DIVERSION REFERRAL 04-15-22 DEPT9/DOP/TE: 1HR/
